title: Pedestrian hit on N2, dead on the scene
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An unidentified male in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An unidentified male in his late 30s was hit by an oncoming vehicle on the N2, just after the Engen garage in the direction of Dana Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An unidentified male in his late 30s was hit by an oncoming vehicle on the N2, just after the Engen garage in the direction of Dana Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident is believed to have occurred at 20:00 on Friday 29 August.","html":"The incident is believed to have occurred at 20:00 on Friday 29 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to KwaNonqaba Police Spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the victim was found dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp told the Mossel Bay Advertiser that police are investigating a case of culpable homicide.","html":"Kapp told the Mossel Bay Advertiser that police are investigating a case of culpable homicide."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The victim was wearing blue jeans, a brown t-shirt and a black leather jacket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone who can identify him is requested to contact the investigating officer, Detective Sergeant Vusi Ndala on 073 823 3923.","html":"Anyone who can identify him is requested to contact the investigating officer, Detective Sergeant Vusi Ndala on 073 823 3923."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Pedestrian hit on N2, dead on the scene
